heading: Dissolution of board of directors of corporation and termination of recognition of national governing bodies
label: 220552 Dissolution of board of directors of corporation and termination of recognition of national governing bodies
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 year after , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 30, 2020section 5(c) of Pub. L. 116–189section 220551 of this title

children.heading: .—Dissolution of Board of Directors of Corporation
children.label: a .—Dissolution of Board of Directors of Corporation
children.text: Effective on the date of enactment of a joint resolution described in section 220551(2)(A) with respect to the board of directors of the corporation, such board of directors shall be dissolved.

children.heading: .—Termination of Recognition of National Governing Body
children.label: b .—Termination of Recognition of National Governing Body
children.text: Effective on the date of enactment of a joint resolution described in section 220551(2)(B) with respect to a national governing body, the recognition of the applicable amateur sports organization as a national governing body shall cease to have force or effect.
